## Summary

**Bug:** Chat drag-and-drop target became much smaller after sessions expanded to fill the view height.

**Root Cause:** 
- Commit `5eaa0e73307` (Jan 16, 2026) changed how sessions list calculates available space, allowing it to expand much more
- The drag-and-drop overlay is only applied to the chat input area, not the entire view
- When sessions expanded, the chat
